column1: # tile_grace.tsv -- LAYER 4b of the desc_sources waterfall: map TILE -> a Site of Grace on/near it.
# Keyed by map tile token (m61_50_43), value = grace human name. Rendered as "around <grace>".
# Coarser than layer 4 (per-check nearest grace): the tile is decoded from the flag (always
# available, so this rescues PENDING/global_filler checks), the grace is the best one on that tile.
# AUTO-GENERATED on Windows -- DO NOT hand-edit; manual fixes go in location_descriptions.tsv.
# Producer (needs grace names, so it runs alongside the coord datamine on Windows):
#   grace_flags.tsv (tile per grace) + the datamined grace-name table -> best grace per tile
#   (prefer a grace whose grace_region_map play_region matches the tile's assigned region;
#    graceless tiles take the nearest grace by tile-center distance in global gx/gz).
# Until it's generated this file is empty and layer 4b no-ops (checks fall to the tile locale).
